tools.name: AddDraftAttachments
tools.description: Add attachments (URI) to an existing draft message.

attachmentUris.description: List of direct file URIs to attach (must be Microsoft 365 file links: OneDrive, SharePoint, Teams, or Graph /drives/{id}/items/{id}).

tools.name: UpdateDraft
tools.description: Update a draft's recipients, subject, body, and attachments. Supports both file URIs (OneDrive/SharePoint) and direct file uploads (base64-encoded). Recipients can be provided as names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved to email addresses using Microsoft Graph.

to.description: List of To recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

cc.description: List of Cc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

bcc.description: List of Bcc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

attachmentUris.description: List of file URIs to attach (OneDrive, SharePoint, Teams, or Graph /drives/{id}/items/{id})

directAttachments.description: List of direct file attachments with format: [{"fileName": "file.pdf", "contentBase64": "base64data", "contentType": "application/pdf"}]

directAttachmentFilePaths.description: List of local file system paths to attach; will be read and base64 encoded automatically.

tools.name: SendEmailWithAttachments
tools.description: Create and send an email with optional attachments. Supports both file URIs (OneDrive/SharePoint) and direct file uploads (base64-encoded). Recipients can be provided as names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved to email addresses using Microsoft Graph.

to.description: List of To recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

cc.description: List of Cc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

bcc.description: List of Bcc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

attachmentUris.description: List of file URIs to attach (OneDrive, SharePoint, Teams, or Graph /drives/{id}/items/{id})

directAttachments.description: List of direct file attachments with format: [{"fileName": "file.pdf", "contentBase64": "base64data", "contentType": "application/pdf"}]

directAttachmentFilePaths.description: List of local file system paths to attach; will be read and base64 encoded automatically.

tools.name: CreateDraftMessage
tools.description: Create a draft email in the signed-in user's mailbox without sending it. Recipients can be provided as names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved to email addresses using Microsoft Graph.

to.description: List of To recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

cc.description: List of Cc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

bcc.description: List of Bcc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

contentType.description: Body content type: Text or HTML

tools.name: GetMessage
tools.description: Get a message by ID from the signed-in user's mailbox.

preferHtml.description: If true, request HTML body format

bodyPreviewOnly.description: If true, returns only the body preview (~255 chars) instead of the full body. Useful for reducing payload size.

tools.name: UpdateMessage
tools.description: Update a message's mutable properties (subject, body, categories, importance).

contentType.description: Body content type: Text or HTML

importance.description: Importance level: Low, Normal, or High

tools.name: FlagEmail
tools.description: Update the flag status on an email message. Supports flagging, completing, or clearing a flag.

messageId.description: Id of the email to be flagged.

flagStatus.description: Flag status to set: NotFlagged, Complete, or Flagged.

mailboxAddress.description: Address of the shared mailbox to update mail.

tools.name: DeleteMessage
tools.description: Delete a message from the signed-in user's mailbox.

tools.name: ReplyToMessage
tools.description: Send a reply to an existing message. Recipients can be provided as names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved using Microsoft Graph.

preferHtml.description: If true, treat comment as HTML

toRecipients.description: Optional override list of To recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved). If provided, a reply draft is created and patched before sending.

ccRecipients.description: Optional override list of Cc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved). Used only when modifying recipients.

bccRecipients.description: Optional override list of Bcc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved). Used only when modifying recipients.

tools.name: ReplyAllToMessage
tools.description: Send a reply-all to an existing message. Recipients can be provided as names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved using Microsoft Graph.

preferHtml.description: If true, treat comment as HTML

toRecipients.description: Optional override list of To recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved). If provided, a reply-all draft is created and patched before sending.

ccRecipients.description: Optional override list of Cc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved). Used only when modifying recipients.

bccRecipients.description: Optional override list of Bcc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved). Used only when modifying recipients.

tools.name: SendDraftMessage
tools.description: Send an existing draft message by ID.

tools.name: SearchMessages
tools.description: Search for email messages using natural language queries powered by Microsoft 365 Copilot. This tool searches across your mailbox to find relevant emails. Use natural language to describe what you're looking for (e.g., 'emails from Sarah about the budget', 'unread messages from this week', 'messages with attachments about the project'). The search focuses specifically on email content and metadata.

message.description: Natural language search query for finding emails (e.g., 'emails from John about the project', 'unread messages from last week')

conversationId.description: Existing conversation id (GUID). Auto-created if missing.

tools.name: GetAttachments
tools.description: Get all attachments from a message, returning attachment metadata (ID, name, size, type).

tools.name: DownloadAttachment
tools.description: Download attachment content from a message. Returns the content as base64-encoded string.

tools.name: UploadAttachment
tools.description: Upload a small file attachment (less than 3 MB) to a message. File content must be base64-encoded.

tools.name: UploadLargeAttachment
tools.description: Upload a large file attachment (3-150 MB) to a message using chunked upload. File content must be base64-encoded.

tools.name: DeleteAttachment
tools.description: Delete an attachment from a message.

tools.name: ReplyWithFullThread
tools.description: Reply (or reply-all) adding new recipients while preserving full quoted thread and optionally re-attaching original files. Recipients can be provided as names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved using Microsoft Graph.

messageId.description: Original message ID to reply to

introComment.description: Introductory comment placed above quoted thread

preferHtml.description: If true, introComment is treated as HTML

additionalTo.description: Additional To recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

additionalCc.description: Additional Cc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

additionalBcc.description: Additional Bcc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

replyAll.description: If true, perform reply-all; otherwise a direct reply

includeOriginalNonInlineAttachments.description: If true, re-attach original non-inline attachments (files)

tools.name: ReplyAllWithFullThread
tools.description: Reply-all adding new recipients while preserving full quoted thread and optionally re-attaching original files.

messageId.description: Original message ID to reply-all to

introComment.description: Introductory comment placed above quoted thread

preferHtml.description: If true, introComment is treated as HTML

includeOriginalNonInlineAttachments.description: If true, re-attach original non-inline attachments (files)

tools.name: ForwardMessageWithFullThread
tools.description: Forward a message adding new recipients and an optional intro comment while preserving full quoted thread; returns sensitivity label. Recipients can be provided as names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved using Microsoft Graph.

introComment.description: Introductory comment placed above quoted thread

preferHtml.description: If true, introComment is treated as HTML

additionalTo.description: Additional To recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved) - required

additionalCc.description: Additional Cc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

additionalBcc.description: Additional Bcc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

includeOriginalNonInlineAttachments.description: If true, re-attach original non-inline attachments (files)

tools.name: ForwardMessage
tools.description: Forward an existing message, optionally adding a comment, recipients, and new attachments while preserving the quoted thread. Recipients can be provided as names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved using Microsoft Graph.

introComment.description: Introductory comment placed above quoted thread

preferHtml.description: If true, introComment is treated as HTML

additionalTo.description: Additional To recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved) - required

additionalCc.description: Additional Cc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

additionalBcc.description: Additional Bcc recipients (can be names or email addresses - names will be automatically resolved)

attachmentUris.description: List of file URIs to attach (OneDrive, SharePoint, Teams, or Graph /drives/{id}/items/{id})

directAttachments.description: List of direct file attachments with format: [{"fileName": "file.pdf", "contentBase64": "base64data", "contentType": "application/pdf"}]

directAttachmentFilePaths.description: List of local file system paths to attach; will be read and base64 encoded automatically.
